title: Onboarding - Eula page - check page UI
scenario: EULA page header, description, and instructions text display correctly during first-time app launch onboarding
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time after installation.
Observe the EULA (End User License Agreement) page that appears on the Home screen.
Verify the header text displayed at the top of the EULA page.
Verify the description text below the header.
Verify the instructions text (e.g., scroll to read, accept/decline options) displayed on the page.
expected: The EULA page displays a clear header (e.g., "End User License Agreement"), a description explaining the agreement, and instructions text guiding the user to scroll and accept or decline the terms.
